title: The Missing Backpack
synopsis: A child thinks a backpack is lost forever, but the answer is closer than expected.
sentences: Kai came home from school and could not find his backpack.
He checked the hall, the kitchen, and under the table.
His books, homework, and lunch box were all inside that bag.
Kai felt his face grow hot as he tried to remember the walk home.
His mother told him to slow down and think carefully.
First, he looked in the car, but it was not there.
Then he called his friend Ben to ask if he had seen it.
Ben remembered Kai putting the bag down near the school gate while they talked.
Kai and his mother walked back to the school as quickly as they could.
At the office, the caretaker smiled and lifted the backpack from behind the desk.
Someone had found it and brought it inside.
Kai thanked the caretaker and promised himself he would be more careful next time.
